fees.description: A platform service fee charged to cover booking infrastructure, 24/7 customer support, and secure payment processing.
A flat convenience fee for online booking access, instant confirmation, and mobile ticket delivery.
A New York City tourism levy collected on behalf of the local government to support tourism infrastructure and public services.
New York State and City combined sales tax of 8% applied to all taxable activity bookings.
A platform service fee covering booking operations, customer support, and secure payment handling for all Paris bookings.
A flat convenience fee for online booking, instant e-ticket delivery, and multilingual customer support.
The French taxe de séjour (tourist tax) collected to fund local tourism infrastructure and cultural preservation in Paris.
French Value Added Tax (TVA) at the reduced rate applicable to tourism and leisure activities in France.
A platform service fee for booking management, English-language customer support, and secure international payment processing.
A flat convenience fee for online booking access, instant QR ticket delivery, and 24/7 traveler support.
A contribution to the Tokyo Tourism Fund supporting sustainable tourism, city infrastructure, and cultural experiences.
Japan's national Consumption Tax (消費税) applied to all goods and services including tourism activities.
A platform service fee covering booking technology, customer support, and secure payment processing for all London activities.
A flat convenience fee for instant online booking, mobile ticket delivery, and dedicated travel support.
A London tourism levy collected to support Visit London, public transportation improvements, and cultural initiatives.
UK Value Added Tax at the standard rate of 20% applied to all tourism and leisure services in England.
A platform service fee covering booking infrastructure, Australian-based customer support, and secure payment processing.
A flat convenience fee for online booking, instant e-ticket delivery, and 24/7 traveler assistance.
A New South Wales tourism levy collected to fund Destination NSW, attraction maintenance, and visitor services.
Australia's Goods and Services Tax of 10% applied to all commercial tourism and leisure activities.
